visa_types.name: Private Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist
Note: Please provide invitation declaration issued by Bulgarian Immigration along with the invitation letter from the invitee.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[bgr > tha > en > Table:Private Visit > Visa Fees 1]
- The charges collected are not refundable in case the applicant is refused a visa.
- Children who are under 12 years of age are exempt from the requirement to pay a visa fee.
- When submitting an application for issuance of a visa for airport transit or for short-term stay, a fee of EUR 90 shall be collected, unless otherwise provided for by law, in an international treaty to which the Republic of Bulgaria is a party, in an act of the European Community/European Union, in an agreement of the European Community/European Union with third countries or in an act of the Council of Ministers.
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Center in Cash/Credit Card in THB only depending on the exchange rate.
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of THB 1,480 (Euro 40) as well as the logistics service fee of THB 1,554 (Euro 42) at the visa application center.
visa_types.processing_time: Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submissions
visa_types.forms:
Application form in English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/b3c6b07ee6f0429d66e4c04851861b5c/visa-application-form-en.pdf)
Application form in Bulgarian (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6e0ofzH2rRjls1vyxkrn0A/a2037949b6d5ac5e9e7bd6246ac025b0/visa-application-form-bg.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For further information, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/TWPpi63hO5eQM7s0bFBPA/2bd2cefb0857b17c2a884a8653fffa70/BG-VISA-C.pdf)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For further information, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/TWPpi63hO5eQM7s0bFBPA/2bd2cefb0857b17c2a884a8653fffa70/BG-VISA-C.pdf)

## Visa Fees
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[bgr > tha > en > Table:Private Visit > Visa Fees 1]
- The charges collected are not refundable in case the applicant is refused a visa.
- Children who are under 12 years of age are exempt from the requirement to pay a visa fee.
- When submitting an application for issuance of a visa for airport transit or for short-term stay, a fee of EUR 90 shall be collected, unless otherwise provided for by law, in an international treaty to which the Republic of Bulgaria is a party, in an act of the European Community/European Union, in an agreement of the European Community/European Union with third countries or in an act of the Council of Ministers.
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Center in Cash/Credit Card in THB only depending on the exchange rate.
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of THB 1,480 (Euro 40) as well as the logistics service fee of THB 1,554 (Euro 42) at the visa application center.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist
Note: Please provide invitation declaration issued by Bulgarian Immigration along with the invitation letter from the invitee.

## Required Photo
A colorful photograph 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm against light colored background-passport format / the face must take up to 70-80% of the photo / photos with dark glasses or non-professional photos are not accepted.

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submissions

## Download Forms
Application form in English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/b3c6b07ee6f0429d66e4c04851861b5c/visa-application-form-en.pdf)
Application form in Bulgarian (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6e0ofzH2rRjls1vyxkrn0A/a2037949b6d5ac5e9e7bd6246ac025b0/visa-application-form-bg.pdf)

visa_types.name: Airport Transit Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist
Documents to be submitted on applying for a type “A” visa
The following documents shall be submitted together with the application on applying for an airport transit visa:
								
- A regular foreign travel document.
- A photocopy of the pages the foreign travel document with the personal information and with the visas laid and/or a photocopy of the held permits for stay in the next states along the route as well as for the end destination state, if required.
- A recent colorful photograph (passport size)
- Flight booking
Before the airport transit visa is issued, the ticket and a copy thereof are presented.
There are additional requirements for the other types of visas.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[bgr > tha > en > Table:Airport Transit Visa > Visa Fees 1]
- The charges collected are not refundable in case the applicant is refused a visa.
- Children who are under 12 years of age are exempt from the requirement to pay a visa fee.
- When submitting an application for issuance of a visa for airport transit or for short-term stay, a fee of EUR 90 shall be collected, unless otherwise provided for by law, in an international treaty to which the Republic of Bulgaria is a party, in an act of the European Community/European Union, in an agreement of the European Community/European Union with third countries or in an act of the Council of Ministers.
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Center in Cash/Credit Card in THB only depending on the exchange rate.
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of THB 1,480 (Euro 40) as well as the logistics service fee of THB 1,554 (Euro 42) at the visa application center.

Application form in English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/b3c6b07ee6f0429d66e4c04851861b5c/visa-application-form-en.pdf)
Application form in Bulgarian (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6e0ofzH2rRjls1vyxkrn0A/a2037949b6d5ac5e9e7bd6246ac025b0/visa-application-form-bg.pdf)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For further information, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3xlDkQhmFgGxXl0ysAcgKs/eeb6e1997a46a522e603306f0580d6f6/B-VISA-A.pdf)

## Visa Fees
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[bgr > tha > en > Table:Airport Transit Visa > Visa Fees 1]
- The charges collected are not refundable in case the applicant is refused a visa.
- Children who are under 12 years of age are exempt from the requirement to pay a visa fee.
- When submitting an application for issuance of a visa for airport transit or for short-term stay, a fee of EUR 90 shall be collected, unless otherwise provided for by law, in an international treaty to which the Republic of Bulgaria is a party, in an act of the European Community/European Union, in an agreement of the European Community/European Union with third countries or in an act of the Council of Ministers.
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Center in Cash/Credit Card in THB only depending on the exchange rate.
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of THB 1,480 (Euro 40) as well as the logistics service fee of THB 1,554 (Euro 42) at the visa application center.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist
Documents to be submitted on applying for a type “A” visa
The following documents shall be submitted together with the application on applying for an airport transit visa:
								
- A regular foreign travel document.
- A photocopy of the pages the foreign travel document with the personal information and with the visas laid and/or a photocopy of the held permits for stay in the next states along the route as well as for the end destination state, if required.
- A recent colorful photograph (passport size)
- Flight booking
Before the airport transit visa is issued, the ticket and a copy thereof are presented.
There are additional requirements for the other types of visas.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Required Photo
A colorful photograph 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm against light colored background-passport format / the face must take up to 70-80% of the photo / photos with dark glasses or non-professional photos are not accepted;

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submissions

## Download Forms
Application form in English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/b3c6b07ee6f0429d66e4c04851861b5c/visa-application-form-en.pdf)

- The charges collected are not refundable in case the applicant is refused a visa.

- When submitting an application for issuance of a visa for airport transit or for short-term stay, a fee of EUR 90 shall be collected, unless otherwise provided for by law, in an international treaty to which the Republic of Bulgaria is a party, in an act of the European Community/European Union, in an agreement of the European Community/European Union with third countries or in an act of the Council of Ministers.
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Center in Cash/Credit Card in THB only depending on the exchange rate.
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of THB 1,480 (Euro 40) as well as the logistics service fee of THB 1,554 (Euro 42) at the visa application center.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For further information, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/TWPpi63hO5eQM7s0bFBPA/2bd2cefb0857b17c2a884a8653fffa70/BG-VISA-C.pdf)

## Visa Fees
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[bgr > tha > en > Table:Transit Visa > Visa Fees 1]
- The charges collected are not refundable in case the applicant is refused a visa.
- Children who are under 12 years of age are exempt from the requirement to pay a visa fee.
- When submitting an application for issuance of a visa for airport transit or for short-term stay, a fee of EUR 90 shall be collected, unless otherwise provided for by law, in an international treaty to which the Republic of Bulgaria is a party, in an act of the European Community/European Union, in an agreement of the European Community/European Union with third countries or in an act of the Council of Ministers.
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Center in Cash/Credit Card in THB only depending on the exchange rate.
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of THB 1,480 (Euro 40) as well as the logistics service fee of THB 1,554 (Euro 42) at the visa application center.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist

## Required Photo
A colorful photograph 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm against light colored background-passport format / the face must take up to 70-80% of the photo / photos with dark glasses or non-professional photos are not accepted;

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submissions

## Download Forms
Application form in English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/b3c6b07ee6f0429d66e4c04851861b5c/visa-application-form-en.pdf)
Application form in Bulgarian (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6e0ofzH2rRjls1vyxkrn0A/a2037949b6d5ac5e9e7bd6246ac025b0/visa-application-form-bg.pdf)
